Good news on the indiscriminate use of flea treatments on dogs and cats. 
FYI, Imidacloprid and fipronil, the chemicals used, are powerful insecticides. One month's dose contains enough poison to kill 25 million bees. These poisons also kill river life.

data.body:
Modern home designs create noise problems.

Wooden floors, open concept, granite counter tops, more bathrooms, floating stairs, etc., all attract more noise than homes designed decades ago, with rooms divided by walls, carpets, fewer bathrooms, and carpeted stairs.
